creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Just a thought. But does the rc script that comes with
the port have a depends on syslog? IOW if the script
can't find syslog already running, it should bail w/
message: syslog can't be found or not running. Please
see syslog(3).
If I've missed something. Please accept my apologies.

HTH

l8r,
Chris
